properties.body:
[Gulf of Finland] ESTONIAN NAV WARN 55/26
GULF OF FINLAND
210500-211600 UTC APR
230300-230800 UTC APR
NE OF OSMUSSAAR ISLAND
FIRING PRACTICE AREA 1A
CENTRED 59-22N 023-33E
FIRING EXERCISES IN PROGRESS
OTHER VESSELS MUST AVOID
ENTRY INTO THE AREA
STANDING BY VHF CH 16 AND 61
CANCEL 230800 UTC APR
